calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation.
Justin McBride, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant James Cox.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 25, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Tenant Lease Agreement---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Ten Day Notice to Quit---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation, and against defendant James Cox as follows:

Past-Due Rents & Per Diem Damages - $438.05.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $438.55.

Additionally, plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 144 Eddy Street, #308, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by the defendant.
The trial date of MAR-29-2010 remains on calendar.
